resources.string: Use centered title for full player
Use bold title for full player
Use a heavier font weight for lyrics
Display high quality song covers and allow album and song cover to differ (requires photos access)
Click here to open the app and continue playback
Sleep timer will pause music at %s
Sleep timer will pause music when song playing at %s ends
Sleep timer will pause music at the end of this song
The app will show the first tab on startup. Tabs after the divider will be hidden.
Experimental UI to display word-by-word lyric with advanced features
Enable MeiZu method of displaying lyrics in status bar (only available on some devices)
Widget that shows lyrics of currently playing media
Do you really want to delete \"%s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Do you really want to delete all songs by \"%s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Spaces before the first letter or after the end of a lyric line may have artistic value. If you disagree, you can turn on this toggle to remove these spaces automatically.
Disable all line transition lyric animations

Gramophone APKs can be created by anyone, because Gramophone is open source. To help remembering where an APK came from, Gramophone provides the package type.

The most common type is Release, which is obtained from F-Droid, Google Play, GitHub or IzzyOnDroid.
The CI package type refers to automated builds made for every commit on GitHub. These builds may be unstable.
For other package types, the name should give a reasonable hint to where the APK is from.

Gramophone crashed :(

Please send me a bug report so issues like what lead to this crash can be fixed!

Each situation as unique as music, without your help it is likely this bug will NOT be fixed!
Please send log to nift4dev@gmail.com - can\'t find mail app
The audio playback system is not initialized. Try playing something!

What were you doing in Gramophone when this crash happened? Please add as many details as possible to increase the chances of me being able to fix the problem.\n\nPlease note that English is preferred for bug reports, but I will try to use machine translation if you send bug reports in another language.
Copied e-mail address and text to clipboard
Show audio quality/format information on the player screen
Apply linear gradient to translation lines in word-synced lyric playback if translations do not have word-sync metadata
Enter message, not an e-mail address
Logs will be sent automatically, explain the issue instead
Logs will be sent as attachment automatically

Gramophone asks for an updated song list on every app start, and while Gramophone is running, it will detect new media automatically as well. This \"Refresh\" button will not reload the media in Gramophone, instead, it will ask your system to re-scan all files from all attached permanent storage devices (this is why it takes some time). This means, unless your system or other apps are malfunctioning, you will never need to use this feature.\n\nMissing some songs? Make sure to check "Settings > Behaviour" for the minimum length filter and folder blacklist, and confirm these settings are set to an expected value. For more possible reasons, please check our FAQ.
No app found that can do this
designed one variation of app icon
A theme where all surfaces in the app are pure black (may cause black crush on OLED displays)
Stop playback when app task is dismissed from recents
Use \"Dynamic Range Compression\" as clipping protection (recommended). If disabled, volume will be reduced instead (volume will not be at the same level, destroying normalization effect).

"\"Boost\" will output both ReplayGain and other music at a higher volume than what is set in your device. (If your device volume is set close to 100%, Boost will not increase the volume). With Boost, you can enjoy music that has similar loudness to other apps, such as games. Please note that this feature is experimental and may interfere with external equalizer apps. Boost does not work with Bluetooth headphones. In case of any volume-related issues, please disable Boost by setting it to 0 dB. "
Reduce volume for loud songs that do not have ReplayGain tags
Increase or decrease the volume of songs with ReplayGain tags. Higher values may cause loss of dynamics due to clipping prevention.
\"Smart\" automatically preserves album dynamics only when playing songs from an album consecutively.
Failed to change favourite state of song
Please click here to apply changes, by granting permission to the favourite playlist file

If no folders are selected in the Whitelist, all folders will be allowed.\n\nWhitelist and Blacklist are applied together, with Blacklist taking priority. For example, you can allow a folder in the Whitelist while excluding one of its subfolders in the Blacklist.
Do you really want to discard your changes to playlist \"%s\"?
There are unsaved changes for the playlist \"%s\". Do you wish to restore these changes, or discard them and start over with a fresh version of the playlist?
Please insert SD card to use this feature
Add some songs by clicking on \"Add to playlist\" in the three-dot menu of a song.
Show file names in the place of song names in the folder and filesystem tabs
